value.text:
Ethereal Confrontation: Dark Fantasy Illustration, Zodiac Villains in Cosmic Battle

#aiart #digitalart #generativeart #aiartcommunity #kutchiwoman #promeaipro #promeai

images.alt:
Create a dark fantasy illustration featuring a terrifying Zodiac Villain split into two warring cosmic entities. These entities are locked in an eternal, cataclysmic battle amidst a swirling vortex of fractured realities.
One side depicts an ethereal, angelic figure glowing with soft gold and white light. This being has feathered wings unfurled in radiant arcs, with eyes that are calm and luminous, exuding a sense of serene determination.
The other side is the embodiment of utter destruction, their devilish counterpart wreathed in shadow-red energy. This dark entity features obsidian horns, tattered bat-like wings, and armor forged from molten metal and fractured void-crystals, with deep shadows accentuating its menacing presence.
The mood is cinematic, with a highly detailed fantasy artwork style inspired by Boris Vallejo. The intended audience is fans of dark fantasy and cosmic horror.

record.text:
Hey! You know what! CALLING ALL INDIE GAME DEVS!

Do you HATE genAI?

Do you swear your game does not use genAI INCLUDING using genAI like Claude?

SHARE IT HERE! I will share them! I will check them all out! I will definitely play some of them! Many if I can afford!

SHARE! YOUR! ART!

Shoving this at the end to make sure it all goes full circle.

Hopefully the next time this is updated, it's me deleting it all. I'm tired.

If an update goes south, I'll maybe amend this, but genuinely, I'm just tired.

value.text:
Just cause I feel like people are going to blame me for any problems, I rambled.

It's all in alt text, I didn't want to flood you.

images.alt:
I am fully aware people are angry at me for this thread.

I didn't expect it to actually reach as many people as it did.

My only goal was to make sure people are informed about a game I genuinely wanted more from.

I have shared my feelings, I have shared what I have seen.

Me bringing this to you all was started with the intent to just let people know that hey, you are spending money on something using GenAI in it's process, and here is how it is being used.

That is important to many of us, many of those who follow me anyway.

That is why I have shared this.

I still have hope for the studio and it's employees, though I also think Chedd may need a vacation to step back and breath, cause not talking these replies over with the team may not have been the best call.

The game is wonderful, it really is, hell, if you don't care about Claude, play it now!

Like, it's in a free playtest, you aren't funding it by playing.

Bug test it, tell the devs what you enjoy, cheer them on and hope they make a statement that they will stop using genAI.

Multiple people have screamed at those of us complaining to leave the Discord. Some got removed for it.

Some deleted their own responses and sit there, angry.

Some of them have genAI avatars, do projects for people who promote genAI, and more. They are all really angry.

Every response from those not wanting genAI have been pretty level headed.

There is a community that cares and wants to see change.

I hope the kind reactions to every post Chedd made don't jade him into siding with those who are also adamantly in the "who cares" column. It's definitely the easier choice, but I think that would be the end of SpryFox.

I don't say that as a threat, but siding with pro GenAI doesn't make a good community.

It makes a toxic one. The exact opposite vibe of what we all wanted from the game.

I think a lot of us would be willing to forgive them if they just said they were going to stop using Claude in their work flow ASAP, apologized for not being more public about it, and explained most of what they said but... not how it was said...

I would also really like the minorities at the company to not feel like they are some sort of checkbox on why using GenAI was okay... and maybe explain how "most employees were against genAI" took weeks of coercion...

I don't know, there's a lot of things that didn't sit well, and I think Chedd should NOT have been handling this, especially alone.

Anyway, sorry, it's a long ramble and I know alt text images aren't great but I don't want that many posts at once going on.

value.text:
So, hey, @spryfox.bsky.social's title, Spirit Crossing, sadly does in fact use GenAI.

Dev's have confirmed as much in their Discord.

There is a Claude file in the game files for the playtest that started a conversation about it, and sadly, that will be the end of it for me.

I'm heartbroken...

images.alt:
Chedd Spry Fox — 2:57 AM
Hi folks, sorry, I've been AFK with family in town today and only just noticing this AI conversation now, right before I was planning to go to bed!
Our designers and engineers are using Claude to make their lives easier; for example, designers will use Claude to help them make a change they want to make by editing dozens of config files quickly instead of painstakingly editing each file by hand. We do not use any form of genAI in any way to create content in Spirit Crossing. All the art, music, etc, is 100% human created. And will continue to be.
I personally also frequently use AI to research various topics online.

Chedd, Spry Fox — 3:17 AM
It is a complex and emotionally charged topic, for many very good reasons. I am grateful that many of you care about this. FWIW, when I spun Spry Fox out of Netflix, I chose to pay myself $20k/year and give the majority of the studio's equity to all the other employees because I care deeply about all the other employees. Our very limited usage of AI is the same: I have allowed it to the extent that it helps my studio's employees hopefully be able to maintain decent work life balance and not grind themselves into paste trying to make this big, complicated MMO with our limited indie studio resources.

record.text: The cause

value.text: Where I’d rather be than work lol

record.text:
I feel like a little kid right now. 😄✨

The Bridge of the USS Horizon!

I’ve studied bridge layouts for years, but actually standing here is something else entirely. Trying to act professional… and probably failing miserably. 🖖🚀

#startrek #boldlygo #aicontent #blog #aibeauty #aiart #starfleet

Okay, back to work. 😅🖖

Today I’m comparing our navigation data with Starfleet records alongside the ship’s Navigation Officer.
And the best part? I’ll finally be visiting the Bridge for the first time!
Try keeping a navigation nerd calm about that.

#startrek #boldlygo #aicontent #blog #aiart

#AiArtCommunity #digitalart #AiArt #aidigitalart #DragonTuesday #cosmic #ethereal #remixratpack #surrealart #design #AiCommunity #AiArtChallenge #SynthArt #CreativeAi #Ai #AiArtwork #qp prompt in ALT

images.alt: A surreal cosmic dragon rising through a fractured dreamscape, portrait orientation. The dragon has an impossibly elongated serpentine body formed from torn nebulae, liquid obsidian, and crystalline void matter, with translucent wings full of eye-like celestial patterns and delicate lace-like holes. A glowing miniature planet is embedded within its chest, suspended by golden geometric rings and arcane energy filaments. Its crown is a chaotic arrangement of jagged ivory spines, floating shards, and impossible architecture that appears to melt into the night sky. Surrounding it are floating monoliths, shattered moons, inverted waterfalls, eclipsed suns, drifting ruins, and distant gothic towers suspended in midair. Atmospheric mist, cosmic dust, glowing runes, subtle gold accents, dramatic scale, deep shadows, ultraviolet highlights, intricate textures, cinematic lighting, epic fantasy surrealism, ultra-detailed concept art, dark ethereal palette of black, violet, silver, and pale gold, awe-inspiring, mysterious, cool and otherworldly, masterpiece quality, highly detailed, sharp focus, volumetric lighting, portrait composition.
